title: Parcel Bomb Explodes in Monaco, Injuring 3
summary_full: The blast seriously injured three people, including a child, according to the authorities, who said the assailant was on the run.
summary_public: The blast seriously injured three people, including a child, according to the authorities, who said the assailant was on the run.
